name: self-improve
description: pi-taskflow 自迭代：分析代码库 → 编写测试 → 修复稳定性

phases.task:
Audit the pi-taskflow project at /Users/beta/work/personal-projects/pi-taskflow.

Read these files thoroughly:
- extensions/runner.ts
- extensions/store.ts
- extensions/render.ts
- extensions/agents.ts
- extensions/runs-view.ts
- extensions/runtime.ts
- test/interpolate.test.ts
- test/schema.test.ts
- test/runtime.test.ts

For each source file in extensions/, identify:
1. All exported public functions
2. Which are covered by existing tests
3. Potential stability bugs (error handling gaps, edge cases, race conditions, unsafe casts, cleanup issues)

Output ONLY a JSON array with this exact structure:
[{"file": "extensions/runner.ts", "exports": ["runAgentTask","mapWithConcurrencyLimit",...], "untested": [...], "bugs": [{"desc":"Short description","severity":"high|medium|low","file":"runner.ts","line":123}], "needsTestFile": false}]

Do NOT include any text before or after the JSON array.

Write comprehensive tests for extensions/runner.ts at test/runner.test.ts.
Functions to test: emptyUsage, isFailed, aggregateUsage, formatTokens, formatUsage, mapWithConcurrencyLimit, getPiInvocation

Use: import assert from "node:assert/strict"; import { test } from "node:test".
Mock deps where needed.

Write comprehensive tests for extensions/store.ts at test/store.test.ts.
Use tmp dirs for hermetic file ops.

Write comprehensive tests for extensions/agents.ts at test/agents.test.ts.
Use tmp dirs with mock .md agent files.

Add edge case tests to test/interpolate.test.ts for safeParse and coerceArray.
Already has basic tests — add: safeParse empty string, whitespace-only, deeply nested JSON, malformed fence, multiple JSON blocks, coerceArray null/undefined, array-like objects.

Run tests and typecheck:

cd /Users/beta/work/personal-projects/pi-taskflow && npm test
npx tsc --noEmit

If all pass: VERDICT: PASS
If failures: VERDICT: BLOCK <details>

Apply targeted fixes:
1. runner.ts: safer tmp dir cleanup
2. store.ts: guard non-null assertions
3. runtime.ts: fix directRef for nested json paths
